global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with engaging text and icons promoting a mobile game.
global.main_message: Encourages players to unlock rare gear and play with friends.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: IronQuest logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo featuring the text 'IronQuest' in a prominent font.

elements.label: Unlock rare gear
elements.description: A clear, inviting text that reads 'Unlock rare gear' in a large, easy-to-read font.

elements.label: Play with friends tonight
elements.description: A supportive text that encourages social play, presented in a friendly font.

elements.label: IronQuest headline
elements.description: The main headline text 'IronQuest' is large and bold, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned at the top left, possibly a game-related icon.

elements.label: Top right decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element located at the top right, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located near the center, likely part of the gameplay interface.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon positioned below the previous one, contributing to the gameplay theme.

elements.label: Left small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located on the left side, enhancing the gameplay interface.

elements.label: Left small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned below the previous left icon, part of the gameplay design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'IronQuest' is visually striking and dominates the top section of the ad.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: The body text 'Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight' is engaging and centrally placed.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button labeled 'Learn more', inviting users to engage further.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, playable, bright and playful, IronQuest, unlock rare gear, play with friends
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: IronQuest, Unlock rare gear, Play with friends tonight, Learn more
